offer_about: Exclusive Offers for Sampath Visa Cardholders - Unlock up to 20% savings across retail, attractions, cruises, transit duty-free shopping, airport dining privileges, and curated experiences across Singapore when you pay with your Sampath Visa card. - Unlock up to 20% savings across retail, attractions, cruises, transit duty-free shopping, airport dining privileges, and curated experiences across Singapore when you pay with your Visa card.; · Lotte Duty Free Singapore - Up to SGD50 off with min. spend at Lotte Duty Free Singapore; · Museum of Ice Cream Singapore - Enjoy a bulk ticket discount of 15% off for ticket purchases of 4 and more; · Pelago by Singapore Airlines - Enjoy 15% off activities in Singapore on Pelago with Visa; · RISIS - Save 10% on selected items with your Sampath Visa card; · Royal Albatross - Enjoy 15% Off Dining & Sailing Experiences on Royal Albatross; · Banyan Group - Unlock 20% off Best Available Rates, plus exclusive benefits at participating properties, worldwide; · Banyan Tree Gallery - 15% off at Banyan Tree Gallery; · Swiss Belhotel International - Get 25% off your stay at Swiss-Belhotel International hotels globally; · Tavelgoogoo - Enjoy complimentary 365 days of unlimited global messaging - Eligible cards: Sampath Visa Credit & Debit Cards - Validity text: Offer Details;.

Exclusive Offers for Visa Cardholders - "Enjoy up to 25 discounts on below listed merchant outlets exclusively for all Sampath Visa Cardholders. (These offers are applicable only for Tap & Pay (contactless) transactions performed at merchant POS terminals.).; La Perfumerie - 15% off on total bill; Wickramaarachchi Opticians - 30% off on frames & sunglasses; Spring & Summer - Enjoy 10 Off; Life Balance - Enjoy 20% Off; Janashakthi - Enjoy Special walk in premium offers; Glomark - Enjoy 10% off on your total bill; Nija - Enjoy 15% off; Pearl Bay - Enjoy 25% off; A & M Cupcake - Enjoy 20% off; Menya Hanabi - Enjoy 20% off; Cafe Colombo - Enjoy 20% off; Kama Maki - Enjoy 20% off; Thilapiya - Enjoy 20% off; Cafe Kumbuk - Enjoy 20% off; Great Wall Restaurant -Enjoy 20% off; Cremalato - Enjoy 20% off; London house of coffee - Enjoy 20% off; The Mango Tree - Enjoy 20% off; Walawwa Kade - Enjoy 20% off; Maharaja Palace - Enjoy 20% off; - These offers are applicable only for Tap & Pay (contactless) transactions performed at merchant POS terminals.; - Eligible cards: For all Sampath Visa Cards - Validity text: Valid every Thursday till 31st July 2026.
